title: Fix memory leak in websocket server
description: Investigate and resolve memory leak occurring in the real-time notification socket server. This leak causes pods to restart every 48 hours under high connection loads.
capacity_reasoning: Core maintenance team has sufficient available capacity this sprint.
Defect-fix type demands are prioritised in the maintenance queue.
Medium risk requires no additional senior architect involvement.
Estimated 2-sprint resolution within current team allocation.
